name: "\U0001F4DA Documentation"
about: Changes to .md files, code comments, or wiki updates.
title: "[\U0001F4DA]"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of the documentation changes or the missing information you've identified.
*Example: The README is missing the installation steps for the new Factory logic.*

## 📂 Scope of Changes
Check all that apply:
- [ ] **README.md** or other Markdown files in the repo.
- [ ] **Wiki** pages.
- [ ] **Code comments** / Docstrings (Sphinx, Pydoc, etc.).
- [ ] **Inline documentation** (technical explanations).

## 💡 Proposed Content / Changes
If you have a draft or specific ideas of what needs to be written, add them here.
> (e.g., "Add a section explaining how the PacketFactory handles Packet 0.")

## ✅ Tasks
- [ ] Draft the content.
- [ ] Proofread for typos and clarity.
- [ ] Check that links (if any) are working correctly.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Does this documentation change relate to a previous feature or bug? 
*(e.g., Fixes #12)*
